title: Record WebSearch default3 and footer web badge
prompt: Create reports/web-search-default3-footer-web.md with sections for WebSearch 3, Footer web, ZDR, and Evidence path.

fixtureActions.content:
# WebSearch Default3 Footer Web Contract

## WebSearch 3
WebSearch defaults to 3 results and steers agents to refine the query before raising limit

## Footer web
footer always shows a web badge for built-in WebSearch/FetchURL/Context7 readiness without MCP

## ZDR
footer keeps zdr when telemetry is off by default

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + web-search/footer vitest + source check
